name: Tests
summary:
The backend test suite lives entirely in `backend/tests/` and contains 328 deterministic tests designed to run in CI without external service dependencies. It covers the FastAPI HTTP routes (`test_api.py`), WebSocket connection manager concurrency (`test_websocket.py`), LangGraph evaluation graph happy-path and fault-tolerant failure modes (`test_graph.py`, `test_graph_failures.py`), MCP JSON-RPC protocol (`test_mcp_server.py`), SQLite pragma application and multi-connection contention (`test_sqlite.py`, `test_sqlite_reliability.py`), path/platform resolution (`test_paths.py`), secret resolution priority (`test_secrets.py`), structured logging observability (`test_observability.py`, `test_log_context.py`), domain logic regressions (`test_regressions.py`), startup smoke tests (`test_startup.py`), ScanManager state machine (`test_scan_manager.py`), GhostService phase contracts (`test_ghost_service.py`), and response-model completeness (`test_response_contracts.py`). Shared infrastructure lives in `conftest.py` (assertion helpers), `fakes.py` (storage backends), and `api_contracts.py` (per-endpoint contract schemas). `TEST_DOCS.md` is documentation, not code.

---

files.Purpose: Test suite documentation — overview, pyramid, markers, contracts philosophy
Shared assertion helpers (API + MCP contracts), path setup, ignore glob
Per-endpoint response contract schemas (TypedDict-style classes)
In-memory fakes for Kuzu, SQLite, LanceDB; `_install_storage_fakes()`
FastAPI route behavior: auth, health, leads CRUD, settings, ingest
LangGraph happy path: compiles, invokes, score range, skip logic
Graph fault-tolerant failure modes: 16 guarantee-classes
JSON-RPC MCP protocol: initialize, tools/list, tools/call, errors
Cross-platform path resolution, browser binary detection
Domain logic regression prevention — scoring, quality, HN, targets
Secret resolution priority chain, warning deduplication
_CM concurrency: async-safety, controlled/deterministic tests
SQLite pragma verification (WAL, FK, busy_timeout)
SQLite contention, WAL isolation, FK enforcement, AST audit
except:pass replacement verification — severity, context
Correlation context API, filter, formatter, middleware
Smoke tests: token/port emission, port binding
ScanManager lifecycle: start/stop/idle, ghost lock guard
GhostService phase contract: preflight skip/return
response_model= completeness + job target CRUD

flags.reason: 435 lines, 35+ unrelated tests in one class — should be split by domain
Defined but only referenced by TEST_DOCS.md, not actual tests
Mocked but never actually called in `_phase_preflight` — verify if code path still exists
Well-factored, single-responsibility, used across test files

inbound: None — this is a leaf unit providing test coverage for all other units.
